title: Support a CI-colon-MACHINE mode
body:
Because the podman machine tests normally run at the end of the chain, it's time consuming for developers to validate machine-only changes. Support a special CI runtime mode, only when a PR is marked as a draft. Update related documentation

Also: Only run machine tests on PRs, never for branches or new tags.

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]". That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: @edsantiago PTAL at this idea.  I drank some inspiration in this morning's coffee :grin:  IIRC (I can test it) the PR title magic Cirrus-CI env. var values are sticky.  In other words, they don't change if you press "re-run".  Since PR-merging is blocked for drafts, and a green "Total Success" status, I simply moved the magic-string check there :ok_hand:
force-push: Woops, forgot to add an `exit 1` to the script.
Test: [Magic string in PR title + draft-mode set](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/4929757645635584).
Test: [Magic string in title, draft mode removed, re-ran success task](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5288963443785728).
Test: [Rebased/force-pushed w/ magic string in title + no draft mode set](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5261671980072960).
Woops: Force-push:  Updated conditions so machine tests only run for PRs.  We only want the most critical bare-bones checks on branches and new tags to avoid flakes.
Redo Test: [Magic string in title + no draft mode set.](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6391661165543424)
_TODO: Test w/o magic, w/o draft, confirm all PR-level tests run normally._
There's at least one more test I need to run.

Test: [Run w/o magic, w/o draft](https://cirrus-ci.com/build/5922175757058048).

***Reviewers: Please double-check my eyeballs, confirm all expected (normal) PR-level tests run/ran.  This PR touches some tricky, anti-POLA logical conditions. I could easily have screwed something up.***
Okay, I think this is ready now.
